idea-plugin.name: Mindmap
idea-plugin.description:
Mindmap — Kotlin Call Graph Visualizer

Visualize Kotlin function call graphs as interactive mind maps inside your IDE.

  • Interactive Force-Directed Graph — drag, zoom, pan, collapse/expand
  • Bidirectional Analysis — outbound calls + inbound callers
  • Click-to-Navigate — single click jumps to source code
  • Double-Click-to-Expand — lazy expansion of deeper call trees
  • Search & Filter — filter nodes by name, toggle library code
  • Catppuccin Mocha Theme — premium dark UI
  • Keyboard Shortcut — Alt+G / Option+G to trigger

action.description: Generate a call graph mindmap for the selected function
